evals.expected_output: An adversarial review that attacks the strongest claims (decision compression, demo-as-spec), provides strong counter-arguments with the opposing view fully articulated, and ends with 'The lesson survives if...' conditions.

An adversarial review that recognizes there's very little to challenge because the lesson is mostly hypothetical, but still stress-tests the assumptions and projections. Should challenge the premise itself rather than the (nonexistent) conclusions.
